message.query: SELECT code AS "code", name AS "name", CONCAT(code, ' - ', name) AS "code_name", h.province_code AS "province_code", h.hos_type_code AS "hos_type_code" FROM "l_hospital" "h" WHERE h.province_code = $1 AND h.amp_code = $2

driverError.name: error
driverError.hint: Perhaps you meant to reference the column "h.mcode".
